text: The surgeon dissects down to the dorsal vein complex, carefully separating the large collection of veins from surrounding tissues.
The surgeon places a stitch in the dissected dorsal vein complex to secure the area.
The surgeon places a stitch into the dorsal vein complex, securing the vein after dissection.
The surgeon cuts the stitch placed in the dorsal vein complex, completing the dissection of the vein structure.
